validations_executed.name: intake-portal-field-minimization-review
evidence: The portal spec limits first-submit mandatory fields to business name, primary contact, current website status, business description, offerings, audience, primary market, primary action, and consent.
Technical fields are collapsed and optional.

validations_executed.name: assessment-default-safety-review
evidence: Assessment and demand defaults are labeled as suggestions and must be confirmed, corrected, or removed by the client.
Stale, weak, or unavailable data becomes verify-before-implementing follow-up instead of public claims.

validations_executed.name: intake-portal-privacy-review
evidence: The spec blocks credentials, passwords, API keys, registrar logins, Cloudflare tokens, and Google passwords from public form collection.
Completed intake submissions remain private and outside the public repository.

validations_executed.name: launch-package-mapping-review
evidence: .mde/intake-portal-form-schema.json maps intake fields to MISSION.md, client summary, missing-info docs, build brief, deployment docs, validation plan, and codex-build.prompt.md.

validations_skipped.name: full Validation Gate
validations_skipped.reason: This generation specifies the intake portal strategy and schema but does not implement the portal yet.

validations_skipped.name: browser workflow validation
validations_skipped.reason: No rendered intake portal exists yet.

reason: The strategy and schema pass design-level checks, but this does not count as a phase-exit Validation Gate pass.
